title.en: Before I knew it, hundreds of domain yuan years...

content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's soul will absorbed this wisp of mist star breath, and obtained the effect of rapid refining, and the soul will continued to grow.

"The breath of the fog star is indeed the most suitable treasure for refining the soul will!"

Ye Tian was very excited, and continued to use this wisp of mist star aura to refine his soul will.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to use the breath of the fog star to refine his soul will, but after casting the fog magic for a long time, he also discovered another flaw in the fog magic technique.

That is, every time you cast the Fog Shadow Technique, your soul will be affected by the Fog Star, and you will gradually be attracted to the Fog Star, and you want to enter the Fog Star, which is not a good thing.

Fortunately, he can give up copying his body, and no matter what the sequelae are, he can solve them.

"That mysterious woman has not practiced the Fog Meditation Technique, so she should not know the sequelae of the Fog Meditation Technique. Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't care about this, he silently practiced the fog and meditation technique, constantly refining the soul will, and strengthening the soul will.

He believed that if he continued to cultivate like this, it wouldn't be long before he could refine his soul will to the fourteenth dimension.

Before I knew it, hundreds of domain yuan years had passed.

At this time.

He had comprehended the rules of one hundred and thirty dimensions, and had already refined his soul will to the limit of the thirteenth dimension 040 will, and if he went further, he could refine his soul will to the fourteenth dimension.

As for cultivation, it is still in the late stage of the seventh realm, but it has made great progress at this level, and it is not too far from the peak of the seventh realm.

......

Spell Gold Vein.

Ye Tian sent a batch of healing things over again on this day, and also sent more Yuanxia mother liquor.

Although the mysterious woman's Yuanxia mother liquid can last for a long time, it will definitely not be disliked, and healing things are also necessary.

Just after Ye Tian finished sending these things, the mysterious woman spoke: "Little guy, my name is the Purple Yun Realm Lord!"

"Purple Yun Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian didn't know what the Purple Yun Realm Lord meant, although he knew some information about the Purple Yun Realm Lord from the prying eyes of the copying talent, but she took the initiative to say her name, the meaning was different, wouldn't she be afraid that her identity would be exposed, thus attracting enemies!

The Purple Yun Realm Lord continued, "I want to have a real cooperation with you!"

"What is real cooperation?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"I'll help you attack the Eighth Realm or even the Ninth Realm, (ajdi) How about you and I join forces to deal with my enemies?" said the Purple Yun Realm Lord.

"Who is your enemy?" Ye Tian asked.

"The existence of the Ninth Realm, the Lord of the Poison Dragon Realm, belongs to the extradimensional creature family. Of course, in the Upper Domain, there is no difference between the extradimensional creatures and the cultivators, but there are some differences in the cultivation system. Many of the forces in the upper domain belong to the extradimensional creatures, and some sects even have both cultivators and extradimensional creatures. "

"How powerful is the Ninth Realm?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's very powerful!" "Even the superdimensional creatures of the Ninth Realm, their physical bodies are enough to match the dimensional domain body, and even the dimensional domain body of the Consummation Realm is not comparable to their physical body. I comprehended the supreme mastery of the Eight Realms, cultivated the dimensional domain body to the consummation realm, and the soul will reached the sixteenth dimension, and I was still severely injured by the Poison Dragon Realm Lord. However, the strength of the Poison Dragon Realm Lord was not very powerful in the Ninth Realm. "

"I think you have, and even if you really can't break through to the Ninth Realm, I don't have any choice. "The Purple Yun Realm Lord didn't dare to leave here, so he could only choose to cooperate with Ye Tian.

"How do you want me to help you, and what good do you want me to do?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord smiled and said: "The advantage is that I can help you break through to the eighth realm, maybe you don't know about the eighth realm, you are indeed very demonic, you have cultivated the primordial domain body, and the dimensional rule realm is not low." But even if you create the Seven Realms of the Seven Realms in the future, and the dimensional rules are raised to an extremely high level, there is still no hope of breaking through the Eighth Realm. "

"Why?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

"It's very simple, resource monopoly!" Ziyun Realm Lord said: "You have been to many realms, you should know very well, many forces have the seventh realm, and they have practiced for I don't know how many years, but there is still no seventh realm, the real eighth realm comes from those forces, and forces like the Purgatory Holy Sect will never be able to cultivate the eighth realm." Let me first talk about the conditions for breaking through to the eighth realm, if you are demonic to the extreme and comprehend the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions, then you can indeed directly break through to the eighth realm, but how difficult it is, it is even more difficult than hitting the eighth realm. "

Ye Tian didn't refute, if he couldn't keep casting the Primal Advent and use the Primordial Star to comprehend the dimensional rules, otherwise his current dimensional rules were still very low and it would be impossible to reach the current realm.

But even with the Primal Star as the object of enlightenment, it would take a long time for him to comprehend the dimensional rules to the three hundred and sixty-five levels.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord continued: "In addition to comprehending the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions, there is only one way to break through to the eighth realm, and that is the Taihao Star of the sixteenth dimension, Taihao Star has given birth to the Taihao Golden Liquid, and only the Taihao Golden Liquid can help the seventh realm break through to the eighth realm, and it is also the only resource that can help the seventh realm break through to the eighth realm. "

"Taihao gold liquid, why is this so?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Because the body of the seventh realm, whether it is a cultivator, a super-dimensional being, or even a multi-dimensional life, there is a multi-dimensional restriction, which is similar to a kind of lock, which can only be broken after comprehending the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions, otherwise it must be with the help of Taihao gold liquid. "

"But it is impossible for the seventh realm to enter the sixteenth dimension, only the eighth realm and the ninth realm like me can enter the sixteenth dimension and enter the Taihao Star to find the Taihao Golden Liquid. However, Taihao Star often breaks out Taihao Storm, and no force dares to occupy Taihao Star for a long time, otherwise it will be looking for death. "

"It is precisely because of this that the eighth realm like me has the hope of entering Taihao Star to find Taihao gold liquid, but there are also many people who have fallen in the eighth realm of Taihao Star, all of which are weak in strength and have fallen unexpectedly. "

"You can imagine that those forces that don't have the peak powerhouse of the Eighth Realm, how can they obtain the Taihao Gold Liquid, and the amount of the Taihao Gold Liquid is limited, it is impossible to cultivate it indefinitely, and most of the Taihao Gold Liquid has been taken away by the forces where the former Ninth Territory is located, and other forces dare not interfere, only a little bit of Taihao Gold Liquid is left for many forces to snatch, and ordinary forces cannot buy Taihao Gold Liquid at all. "

The words of the Purple Yun Realm Lord shocked Ye Tian very much.

If he hadn't comprehended the dimensional rules to three hundred and sixty-five, then with his status, it would indeed be impossible to obtain Taihao Gold Liquid.
